title: Shits fucked — Mom leaves the house, Yermy alone
html:
TL;DR

  • Oct 16, 2019 three-line entry titled "Shits fucked": "Havoc wreaked / Mom grabbed shit and left, I went with her / I left Yermers alone at house" — a domestic-rupture event-log on the night it happened.
  • Earliest dated note in the vault recording Mom physically leaving the Grants Pass family house with Yahir in tow, leaving brother Yermers behind.
  • Written in three second person event log lines — no analysis, no resolution, just timestamped facts.
  • The household-rupture context that gives weight to the "show dad documents" / "liquidate Gtano's" thread happening the same fall.
  • "Yermers" is a name-variant of Yermy, confirming the brother-pair already configured in the family-entity graph.

Key quotes

"Havoc wreaked"

"Mom grabbed shit and left, I went with her"

"I left Yermers alone at house"

Why it matters in the graph

This is the first dated household-rupture event-log in the vault — Yahir, age 17, choosing to go with Mom when she leaves and explicitly noting he left Yermers at the house. The mid-October timing places this between the Gtano's liquidation note (Sept 28) and the Maya on father went wrong reflection (Oct 31).

These three October 2019 notes form a two-week family-collapse arc: business liquidation → mom leaves → meaning-making conversation. The "havoc wreaked" compression — three words, no subject — is Yahir at his most stripped-down in the corpus. By Christmas Eve 2022, the dad's psychosis episode lands inside a story whose first inflection point lives in this note.
